revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Category:1988 in Japan]] <includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Category:1988 in Japan]]</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories]] [[ja:Category:1988年の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في 1988]] [[az:Category:1988-ci ildə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:1988 in Japan]] [[cs:Category:Japonsko v roce 1988]] [[eo:Category:1988 en Japanio]] [[es:Category:Japón en 1988]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در ۱۹۸۸ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:1988 au Japon]] [[hy:Category:1988 Ճապոնիայում]] [[id:Category:Jepang dalam tahun 1988]] [[ko:Category:1988년 일본]] [[ku:Category:1988 li Japonê]] [[nn:Category:1988 i Japan]] [[no:Category:1988 i Japan]] [[pl:Category:1988 w Japonii]] [[pt:Category:1988 no Japão]] [[ru:Category:1988 год в Японии]] [[sr:Category:Јапан у 1988.]] [[sv:Category:1988 i Japan]] [[tr:Category:1988'de Japonya]] [[uk:Category:1988 у Японії]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں 1988ء]] [[vi:Category:Nhật Bản năm 1988]] [[zh_min_nan:Category:1988 nî Ji̍t-pún]] [[zh:Category:1988年日本]]

Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
link to Commons is now defined on wikidata

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

Bot: add [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=1988_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
